name: Surfshark
tagline: Best value VPN with unlimited device connections
description: Surfshark delivers impressive features at a budget-friendly price, with the unique advantage of unlimited simultaneous device connections.
longDescription: Surfshark has rapidly grown from a budget newcomer to one of the most feature-rich VPNs on the market. Its standout feature is unlimited simultaneous device connections — while most VPNs cap you at 5-10 devices, Surfshark lets you protect every device in your household under a single subscription. But Surfshark isn't just about quantity; it delivers quality too. The CleanWeb 2.0 feature blocks ads, malware, and phishing attempts, while the GPS spoofing feature on Android prevents apps from detecting your real location. The merger with Nord Security in 2022 brought additional resources and expertise, making Surfshark a serious contender at a fraction of the price of premium competitors.
pros: Excellent value — lowest price among top-tier VPNs
CleanWeb 2.0 blocks ads, malware, and phishing
GPS spoofing on Android for location privacy
cons: Smaller server network than NordVPN or ExpressVPN
Some advanced features require paid add-ons
Occasional inconsistencies in speed on distant servers

keyFeatures.name: Unlimited Devices
keyFeatures.description: Connect every device you own simultaneously — phones, laptops, tablets, smart TVs, gaming consoles. The only VPN in our top 10 with genuinely unlimited connections.

keyFeatures.name: CleanWeb 2.0
keyFeatures.description: Advanced ad and malware blocking that works at the DNS level. Blocks pop-ups, cookie consent banners, and malicious websites before they even load.

keyFeatures.name: GPS Spoofing
keyFeatures.description: Android-only feature that matches your phone's GPS location to the VPN server location. Prevents apps from detecting your real position through GPS data.

keyFeatures.name: Rotating IP
keyFeatures.description: Automatically changes your IP address every few minutes without disconnecting. Adds an extra layer of anonymity for privacy-conscious users.

verdict: Surfshark is hands-down the best value VPN on the market. For less than $2.50/month, you get a full-featured VPN with unlimited connections — an unbeatable deal for families and users with many devices. While it doesn't quite match NordVPN or ExpressVPN in raw speed, the gap is surprisingly small given the price difference.

faqs.question: Is Surfshark really unlimited devices?
faqs.answer: Yes. Unlike most VPN providers that cap connections at 5-10 devices, Surfshark has no limit on simultaneous connections. You can protect every device in your household — phones, laptops, tablets, smart TVs, and even share with family members — all under a single account.

faqs.question: How is Surfshark so cheap compared to other VPNs?
faqs.answer: Surfshark's pricing strategy focuses on volume and long-term subscriptions. The 2-year plan at $2.49/month is heavily discounted to acquire customers. After the initial term, renewal pricing is higher but still competitive. The company also benefits from its 2022 merger with Nord Security, which provides shared infrastructure and R&D resources.

author.name: Alex Chen
author.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
author.bio: Alex has tested over 50 VPN services across 5 years at TrueTopReviews. He holds CISSP and CEH certifications.

seoMeta.title: Surfshark VPN Review 2026: 9.2/10 — Best Value VPN | TrueTopReviews
